title: Scholar
description: Two-page book editing/viewing, easy formatting, colored books, literate mobs and other book-related improvements
body:
#### Improving Minecraft book experience, two pages at a time


[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iZ4xf3k8h7g)



Description in text form

Better Screens

Vanilla book editing, viewing and signing screens have been replaced with new, completely redesigned ones, which add many new features and improvements: - View and edit two pages at once (almost like a real book!) - Formatting and other editing tools - Editing books on a Lectern - Custom book author and more...

Formatting

No more struggles with § symbols, just select the text you want to format and the formatting toolbar will show up - Easy application with mouse or keyboard shortcuts - Uses vanilla system under the hood

Import / Export

Text from Writable and Written books can be saved to a file and loaded from it - Exported as human-readable .txt - Formatting is preserved by default, can be excluded if desired

Colorful Books

Books can be dyed into any color, like a leather armor - Color is shown on the item, in GUIs, on a Lectern and on a Chiseled Bookshelf

Block Tooltips

Looking at a Lectern or a Chiseled Bookshelf slot will show a tooltip with the book item stored on it

Reading

Fancy animation for players using a book in hand - Book and Quill makes it a writing animation instead, adding a feather to the hand

Literate Mobs

With a 5% chance, Zombies, Husks and Skeletons will spawn holding a Book and they will read it occasionally - Book has a 50% chance to drop when the mob dies
